title: SCP-294, The Coffee Machine
description: A mysterious coffee machine that can dispense any liquid imaginable for a small price.
body:
The Coffee Machine adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-294, also known as the Coffee Machine.


SCP-294 looks like a regular coffee machine but can produce almost any drink when interacted with. Players can right-click it to open a menu, choose a drink, and receive a filled cup. Each use costs 1 XP level, without XP, no drink will be made. Every drink has a unique effect! Some heal or buff the player, while others cause nausea, fire, or even explosions. Whether you want a refreshing coffee or something far more dangerous, SCP-294 can make it, if you dare to try.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-294spawn?

SCP-294 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-294s.

► What does every drink do?

SCP-294 can produce a lot of drinks that cost 1 XP level per cup. Each drink has a unique effect:

● A Cup of Water = Extinquish fire.

● A Cup of Milk = Removes every effect.

● A Cup of Honey = Removes poison.

● A Cup of Lemonade = Removes Nausea and adds Speed I for 10 seconds.

● A Cup of Apple Juice = Adds Absorption I for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Coffee = Adds Speed II for 30 seconds.

● A Cup of Tea = Adds Regeneration I for 10 seconds.

● A Cup of Hot Chocolate = Adds Saturation I for 30 seconds.

● A Cup of Cola = Adds Speed II and Night Vision for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Fanta = Adds Speed II for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Sprite = Adds Speed II for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Spezi = Adds Speed II for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Energy Drink = Deals 3 damage and adds speed III for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of White Monster = Adds with 50% strength  II for 20 seconds or with 50% chance a text "You start feeling more feminine".

● A Cup of Beer = Adds Nausea and Strength for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Jägermeister = Adds Nausea for 20 seconds and plays the sound "JÄGERMEISTER".

● A Cup of Vodka = Adds Nausea and Resistance for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Wine = Adds Nausea and Regeneration for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Oil = Adds Weakness, Slowness and Wither for 15 seconds and with 10% chance the text "DID SOMEONE SAY OIL?!?!?"

● A Cup of Blood = Adds Nausea for 10 seconds.

● A Cup of Joe = Deals damage when made, adds Weakness, Nausea and Slowness for 20 seconds.

● A Cup of Poison = Adds Poison II for 15 seconds.

● A Cup of Acid = Adds Wither III for 15 seconds.

● A Cup of Lava = Sets you on fire for 15 seconds.

● A Cup of Mercury = Adds Nausea, Blindness and Wither II for 15 seconds.

● A Cup of Liquid Gold = Sets you on fire for 5 seconds and deals 5 damage. Can be smelted into 
one Gold Ingot.

● A Cup of Liquid Iron = Sets you on fire for 5 seconds and deals 5 damage. Can be smelted into one Iron Ingot.

● A Cup of Liquid Hydrogen= Explodes after 3 seconds.

● A Cup of Suprise = Gives a random effect from a random drink.

</details>



![SCP-294](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad5e04230f9541ff53dcd6a35fd63f908f610e9a.png)

SCP-294 is a coffee machine found inside a containment chamber. When right-clicked, it opens a menu where players can select from a wide range of drinks, each with different effects. Positive drinks like Tea, Coffee, or Lemonade grant buffs such as Regeneration or Speed, while dangerous ones like Acid, Lava, or Mercury inflict harmful effects or ignite the player. Some drinks, like a Cup of Suprise trigger random results, and special variants such as “White Monster” or “Jägermeister” add humorous outcomes. Using SCP-294 consumes one XP level per cup, and after drinking, an empty cup is returned that can be crafted into paper.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
